verdict_detail: Item 1 VERIFIED 3/3; Items 2 & 3 BLOCKED (handlers shipped but calendar grid never receives keyboard focus in storefront, and Storybook is down 503 so the dev's validation path could not be re-run); Item 4 out of scope (dev deferred to separate story)

2_home_end_week_nav.reason: grid never receives keyboard focus in storefront; handler code present + wired

3_pgup_pgdn_month_year.reason: same grid-focus-entry gap; NOTE shipped code uses Shift+PgUp/Dn for year (WAI-ARIA APG), ticket STR says Ctrl

4_back_nav_filter_state.reason: dev deferred to separate story (JIRA comment 2026-06-03)

side_effects: Pre-existing focus-entry gap: VcDatePicker never moves keyboard focus into the calendar grid on open (governed by VcPopover, NOT changed by PR #2312 — likely pre-existing, not a regression). Makes the new Home/End/PgUp/PgDn handlers unreachable for keyboard users → WCAG 2.1.1 goal not delivered in product.
ac_discrepancy: Ticket Item 3 AC says Ctrl+PgUp/Dn for year; shipped code uses Shift+PgUp/Dn (correct per WAI-ARIA APG). AC should be corrected.
